//: Skills gate dialogue options, passive 'voice' insights, and puzzle solutions. A skill's value = its governing attribute + race/class bonuses. voiceColor styles the skill's internal commentary in dialogue.

skills.name: Force
skills.desc: Break, bend, lift, hold. The argument that needs no words.

skills.name: Endurance
skills.desc: Outlast cold, pain, and long roads.

skills.name: Sleight
skills.desc: Nimble fingers: locks, knots, hidden catches, light pockets.

skills.name: Stealth
skills.desc: Move as the Hush does — unheard.

skills.name: Lore
skills.desc: Old stories, older warnings. Knowing what a thing is before it shows you.

skills.name: Tinkering
skills.desc: Gears, pumps, bell-works, and how to make broken things sing.

skills.name: Persuasion
skills.desc: Coax, bargain, rally, console. Words that still carry weight.

skills.name: Insight
skills.desc: Hear what people leave unsaid — increasingly the only thing anyone says.
